press:
FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE — Portland, Oregon, [DATE]

[HEADLINE: plain statement of what happened, no euphemisms]

Today at [TIME PT], [WHAT HAPPENED — one sentence, exact numbers, named product]. [APPROVED APOLOGY LINE — see legal's approved list].

What happened: [VERIFIED FACTS — durations in minutes, counts exact; if unconfirmed, say 'we're confirming'].

What we're doing: [THE FIX — named workstream and a date].

What it means for you: [CUSTOMER IMPACT — state credits/remediation; if SLA credits apply, say they are automatic].

[EXEC NAME], [EXEC TITLE]: "[QUOTE — warm, direct, no clichés, one sentence of humility]."

[BISCUIT WELLBEING LINE — required only if Biscuit-adjacent, exactly one sentence]

Media contact: press@luminacloud.example. Next update: [TIME].
internal:
TO: All staff
FROM: [EXEC NAME], [EXEC TITLE]
RE: [INCIDENT SHORT NAME] — what happened and what we need from you

Team —

By now you've seen [THE THING]. Here's the same information customers are getting, plus what we need internally.

Facts: [VERIFIED FACTS — same numbers as the public statement, no more, no less].

What we're doing: [FIX + OWNING TEAM].

What we need from you:
- Do not comment publicly, repost, or 'add context' on social. All press to press@luminacloud.example.
- [SCENARIO-SPECIFIC ASK]
- Route customer questions to [CHANNEL]; do not improvise remedies or credits.

Questions to #incident-comms. Next internal update: [TIME].

— [EXEC NAME]
customer_email:
Subject: [PLAIN SUBJECT — what happened, no marketing verbs]

Hi [CUSTOMER NAME],

[WHAT HAPPENED — one sentence, exact numbers, whether this customer was affected]. [APPROVED APOLOGY LINE].

What this means for your account: [SPECIFIC IMPACT — data, invoices, tickets, uptime].

What we've already done: [COMPLETED ACTIONS with timestamps].

What happens next: [REMEDIATION + DATE; if SLA credits apply, confirm they are automatic and need no claim].

If anything here doesn't match what you're seeing, reply directly — a human reads these. [HUMAN ESCALATION CONTACT].

— [EXEC OR TEAM NAME], Lumina Cloud
stakeholder_priorities: Affected Tier-1 enterprise customers (direct calls from account teams, before any public post)
All customers via status.luminacloud.example (within 15 minutes of confirmed impact, per COM-9)
Employees via #incident-comms (before they read it on social)
Press via press@luminacloud.example (statement, not interviews, until facts are verified)
Investors and board (CFO owns; same facts as public statement)
Regulators, if data, safety, or aviation is implicated (General Counsel owns)
Biscuit's handler, if the incident is llama-adjacent (wellbeing confirmation for the required statement line)
